00037 
00038 #include "longlong.h"
00039 
00040 /*
00041  * Shift an (unsigned) long long value right (logical shift right).
00042  */
00043 long long
00044 __lshrdi3(long long a, unsigned int shift)
00045 {
00046         union uu aa;
00047 
00048         if (shift == 0)
00049                 return(a);
00050         aa.ll = a;
00051         if (shift >= INT_BITS) {
00052                 aa.ui[L] = aa.ui[H] >> (shift - INT_BITS);
00053                 aa.ui[H] = 0;
00054         } else {
00055                 aa.ui[L] = (aa.ui[L] >> shift) |
00056                     (aa.ui[H] << (INT_BITS - shift));
00057                 aa.ui[H] >>= shift;
00058         }
00059         return (aa.ll);
00060 }
